name: Feature Initialization & Discovery
description: Performs initial codebase analysis to discover and create features by scanning source files and calling Claude Sonnet to identify logical features with their files, keywords, and dependencies. Excludes non-code assets (.png, .meta files) from discovery scans to focus on relevant source code.

Dependency analysis via import/using statement parsing
dependencies: Calls Claude Sonnet for feature identification
